data.reasoningText:
The user wants to iterate quickly on a failing test without rebuilding each time. Let me look at their project to understand the setup and suggest the fastest workflow. They have a .NET test project, so `dotnet watch test` would be the ideal solution for hot-reload iteration.

Let me look at their files to give specific advice.

data.content:
Use `dotnet watch test` — it rebuilds and reruns automatically on every file save:

```bash
dotnet watch test --filter "ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException"
```

The fix is on **line 29** — the validation only checks `== 0` but not negative values. Change it to:

```csharp
if (amount <= 0) throw new ArgumentException("Amount must be positive");
```

Want me to start `dotnet watch` and apply the fix so you can see it pass live?
